moduleResolution.summary: Fix imports to point to new module locations after refactoring. Delete test files if source genuinely deleted with no replacement.

autoMergeStrategy.summary: Option A: enable GitHub repo setting 'Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests'. Document in workflow comments.

testPolicy.summary: Update tests to match current source behavior. Source is correct, tests drifted. Understand new behavior and update expectations.

ciWorkflow.summary: Leave CI autofix workflow running. Once tests pass on develop, it stops triggering.

scopeBoundary.summary: Strictly fix 69 failures + unblock auto-merge. No test infrastructure improvements.
